data.content: Validated the scanned-agent multi-add flow end to end. Added a cancel-path assertion to scripts/test-copilot-settings-ui.mjs so the smoke check now reopens Scan, dismisses without selecting a model, and verifies the two previously added Copilot models remain unchanged. Validation run in /Users/cartine/foolery/.knots/_worktree/foolery-67b5: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build; bun run test:smoke:copilot:ui. Commit: 57dec4156e3a.
